prestazioni: AMG M178 LS2 4.0L V8 Biturbo (430.3 cu in) engine: Full Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ upgrade with forged internals (Mahle Motorsport pistons, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft), ported cylinder heads with oversized valves, and a custom Weistec billet aluminum intake manifold with 90mm throttle bodies. Paired with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (84mm compressor wheel) and a Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate for 28 psi of boost, targeting 850+ WHP on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU managing the fueling and ignition maps.

Drivetrain: OS Giken 2.2L twin-plate clutch with billet flywheel and a Quaife ATB helical LSD (part #QKE9Y) for the AMG GT R's transaxle 7-speed dual-clutch transmission (722.9). Reinforced half-shafts from The Driveshaft Shop (Stage 3) with CV joints rated for 1,000+ Nm of torque, and a custom aluminum differential cover with integrated oil cooler from Verus Engineering.

Suspension & Chassis: Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) and remote reservoirs, paired with a full Verus Engineering aero kit (front splitter, rear diffuser, and GT3-spec rear wing) for 1,200 lbs of downforce at 150 mph. The front subframe is reinforced with a Weistec Engineering strut tower brace and a custom carbon fiber monocoque brace, while the rear subframe is solid-mounted with polyurethane bushings from 034Motorsport.
estetica: Exterior: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Pandem Design) with custom carbon fiber fenders, front canards, and a ducktail spoiler extension. The entire body is wrapped in Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film (Matte Graphite Black) with a 3M 2080 Gloss Black roof and mirror caps. Front grille replaced with a custom CNC-machined aluminum mesh (AMG GT3-inspired) from RaceMesh, and the rear diffuser is a full carbon fiber unit from APR Performance (GT-250 model).

Wheels & Tires: HRE P101SC wheels (20x11 ET15 front, 21x12.5 ET5 rear) in a custom brushed titanium finish, mounted with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30/20 front, 325/30/21 rear). The rear wheels feature a custom offset to clear the Weistec big brake kit (400mm front rotors with 6-piston calipers, 380mm rear rotors with 4-piston calipers), which are painted in Brembo Racing Yellow.

Interior: Full carbon fiber weave interior from Seibon Carbon, including door cards, center console, and dashboard trim. Recaro Pole Position seats (fixed-back) with custom Alcantara and Nappa leather upholstery (black with red stitching) from Status Racing. The steering wheel is a MOMO Prototipo (350mm diameter) with a custom quick-release hub, and the shift paddles are replaced with CNC-machined aluminum units from 034Motorsport. A Motec C127 dash logger replaces the stock instrument cluster, with a custom carbon fiber mount.
